markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: Rockstar Games' repeated delays of Grand Theft Auto VI, most recently shifting the release from May 26 to November 19, 2026, have extended the timeline and created a longer window for major cultural, tech, and music milestones to occur beforehand. The studio cited the need for additional polish after missing earlier 2025 targets, a move that aligns with its history of prioritizing quality over speed in the franchise. This breathing room has fueled trader focus on high-profile developments such as potential Russia-Ukraine ceasefire progress, new album drops from artists like Drake or Playboi Carti, and AI advancements like a GPT-6 release, all of which could resolve before the game hits consoles. Industry watchers note that Rockstar typically ramps up marketing with additional trailers and updates in the months leading to launch, adding catalysts that could shift sentiment around pop culture events. With the November date now locked in, attention centers on whether these outcomes materialize amid evolving global and entertainment landscapes.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent mistrial in Harvey Weinstein’s third New York rape retrial has sharply boosted the “No Prison Time” outcome to 74.5% implied probability. A Manhattan jury deadlocked on the Jessica Mann rape charge in mid-May 2026, leaving prosecutors weighing a potential fourth trial while Weinstein already serves a 16-year California sentence for prior convictions. Any additional New York term from the pending criminal-sexual-act conviction or new proceedings would likely run concurrently or be limited by time served, health factors, and appeals, reducing the chance of meaningful extra incarceration. The lower-probability brackets for 5–30+ years reflect residual risk of a successful retrial or consecutive sentencing, but the hung jury and procedural fatigue have tilted trader consensus toward minimal or no further time.

markets.question: Will the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Carolina Hurricanes win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve to “No” if it becomes impossible for this team to win the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup based off the rules of the NHL.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the NHL.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Carolina Hurricanes enter the 2026 Stanley Cup Final as the consensus favorite after posting the NHL's top Eastern Conference record at 53-22-7 and advancing through the playoffs with a dominant 12-1 mark, including a five-game Eastern Conference Final win over Montreal. Home-ice advantage for Games 1, 2, 5, and 7 further supports their positioning against the Vegas Golden Knights. The Golden Knights, despite a more modest 39-26-17 regular-season finish, reached the Final via a strong Western Conference run capped by a series win over the Presidents' Trophy-winning Colorado Avalanche, aided by a late-season coaching change to John Tortorella that sparked improved results. Trader pricing reflects Carolina's superior regular-season standing and recent form as the primary drivers of the current implied probabilities.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Oklahoma City Thunder hold the top implied probability in the 2026 NBA Champion market thanks to their league-best 64-18 regular-season record as defending champions, led by Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's MVP-caliber play. These three teams' combination of regular-season dominance, current form, and playoff matchups explains their clear separation from the rest of the field.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spain edges France as the narrow market leader for the 2026 FIFA World Cup title amid a tightly bunched field of European contenders, reflecting the depth of their respective squads and recent international results. Spain, the current European champions under Luis de la Fuente, have maintained strong qualifying form and possess versatile attacking options, while France leverage exceptional squad depth and experience from their 2018 title and 2022 final appearance. England sit third after reaching consecutive European Championship finals, though historical tournament exits temper trader expectations despite a flawless qualifying campaign. The 48-team format and group-stage matchups further compress probabilities, with South American sides like Argentina and Brazil facing tougher paths through CONMEBOL qualification and potential knockout brackets. This setup underscores how minor edges in recent form and roster health can shift implied probabilities before the June 11 opener.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez draws support from progressive voters at 10.5%, while Kamala Harris retains 8.0% from prior national exposure. Key differentiators among frontrunners include governing experience versus congressional records, regional strongholds, and appeal to distinct party factions. Consolidation around one outcome could occur through strong midterm performances, early primary-state polling trends, major endorsements, or fundraising surges that narrow the path to victory.
